tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,1): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'enum'.

tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,6): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'E'.
tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,8): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(2,5): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(2,5): error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(3,1): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.


==== tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua (8 errors) ====
    enum E {
    ~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'enum'.
         ~

         ~

           ~

        A,
        ~
